response.justification: Although Bogdan has extensive software engineering experience and strong practices in modern web and full-stack development, he completely lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of C++ development experience on Windows. His C++ exposure is limited to a brief 6-month stint in 2014-2015 and academic projects. Furthermore, he lacks the required fixed income or deep capital markets domain expertise, making him fundamentally unsuited for this specialized C++ role.
strengths: Extensive overall software engineering experience (15+ years) with strong architectural and full-stack skills.
Demonstrated experience with CI/CD pipelines, DevOps, and scripting languages, which matches several desirable skills.
Brief exposure to the financial sector and investment practices through his work at RIDE Capital.
concerns: Critically lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development experience.
No demonstrated experience with Windows platform development; his background heavily leans toward web, Node.js, DLang, and Linux.
Missing the mandatory domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking.
